description: Plan tier 1 monthly studio membership granting shared wheel access and two open-studio sessions per week at the Higashiyama Craft Collective.
name: Plan tier 1

description: Plan tier 2 monthly studio membership adding a dedicated shelf and four open-studio sessions per week at the Higashiyama Craft Collective.
name: Plan tier 2

description: Plan tier 3 monthly studio membership with unlimited open-studio access and one group glaze-chemistry workshop per month.
name: Plan tier 3

description: Plan tier 4 monthly studio membership including a half-shelf bisque firing allowance and priority kiln scheduling.
name: Plan tier 4

description: Plan tier 5 monthly studio membership with a full-shelf firing allowance across bisque and glaze cycles and a monthly wood-ash glaze materials credit.
name: Plan tier 5

description: Plan tier 6 monthly studio membership adding a private locker, dedicated wheel reservation slots, and quarterly kiln-loading priority.
name: Plan tier 6

description: Plan tier 7 monthly studio membership with a semi-private throwing bay and unlimited soda and reduction firing allowance.
name: Plan tier 7

description: Plan tier 8 monthly studio membership offering a fully dedicated 25 sqm studio bay, all-firing access, and commission consultation support.
name: Plan tier 8
